common.copa.title: CoPA Profile
common.copa.description: Generate a six-factor CoPA profile from historical user messages across a session, a project, or your full history.
common.copa.scope.label: Scope
common.copa.empty.title: No CoPA Profile yet
common.copa.empty.description: Choose a scope, confirm the model settings, and generate a CoPA Profile from user-only history.
common.copa.historyDescription: Every generation is stored as a new Profile version for the current scope.
common.copa.historyEmpty: No Profiles for this scope yet.
common.copa.resonance.title: Scientist Resonance
common.copa.resonance.description: Map the currently selected CoPA Profile to long-term and recent-state scientist mirrors.
common.copa.resonance.recentStateEmpty: There are not enough recent user messages in this scope to infer a recent-state resonance.
common.copa.resonance.empty.description: Use the currently selected CoPA Profile as the long-term signal, then generate matching scientist resonance.
common.copa.resonance.empty.noProfile: Select or generate a CoPA Profile first, then you can generate scientist resonance from it.
common.copa.resonance.error.noProfile: Select or generate a CoPA Profile first.
common.copa.error.noSignals: No user messages were found in the selected scope.
common.copa.actionsDescription: Export the selected CoPA Profile or regenerate it for the current scope.
common.copa.resonance.actionsDescription: Use the selected CoPA Profile to generate or refresh the scientist resonance result.
